capabilities.failure.load.description: The downloaded interface could not start. Your chat and saved data are unchanged.
capabilities.failure.load.error: The downloaded interface could not be loaded.
capabilities.failure.load.title: {{name}} didn't load

connections.mediaSources.atlas.apiKeyLin: Get your Atlas Cloud API key
connections.mediaSources.atlas.imageDesc: Generate images across Atlas Cloud's hosted model catalog.
connections.mediaSources.atlas.name: Atlas Cloud
connections.mediaSources.atlas.videoDefa: Connection-scoped defaults for Atlas Cloud asynchronous video generation.
These values are sent to Atlas Cloud's asynchronous media API. Model limits vary, so keep the selected model's documentation in mind.
connections.mediaSources.atlas.videoDesc: Generate text-to-video and image-to-video with Atlas Cloud's hosted models.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.er: The Android app could not change the status bar.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.he: Shows Android's time, battery level, and notification icons above Marinara. Turn it off for the distraction-free fullscreen view.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.un: Available in the Marinara Engine Android app.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.up: Update the Marinara Engine Android APK to use this setting.
settings.application.description: Language, safety confirmations, achievements, music, and playful extras.
settings.application.intro: Core app behavior, ordered from daily controls to mode-specific tuning.
settings.application.language.fallback: If a translation is missing, Marinara displays the English text.
settings.application.language.help: Choose the interface language. This changes Marinara's controls and guidance, not model prompts or chat content.
settings.application.language.label: Language
settings.application.title: App Behavior
settings.notifications.customSound.descr: Used by the existing notification sound switches on every device connected to this server.
settings.notifications.customSound.forma: MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A/MP4, or WebM · up to 10 MB · included in backups
settings.notifications.customSound.label: Custom sound
